emails.subject: Peoples
emails.body: Peoples In case you need the details. These numbers are as of 11/28 curves. DG

emails.subject: Peoples
emails.body: This is the last file I sent Dierdre. It has four tabs. One summarizes the monthly cash flow into two columns (Peoples Deal and PERC Deal). The monthly values are PV'd. The PERC tab is the Lagrasta deals. The Peoples Deal is broken into two tabs (Baseload Sale and Transport). The baseload sale includes all of the price fixing deals as well as the index -$.03 deal. Transport is just that. I hope this helps. DG

emails.subject: Re: Peoples
emails.body: Re: Peoples Thanx... Laura Laura Luce

emails.subject: RE: Peoples
emails.body: RE: Peoples Do you have quantities at price or is it all calculations? Thanx, Laura To: Luce, Laura

emails.subject: RE: Peoples
emails.body: Everything is lumped together, meaning price, basis, and index, in that file. DG To: Giron, Darron C.
